title: Traefik basic-auth re-prompt loop and stale JS cache
fixes: apiFetch + chat stream: credentials include for Traefik basic-auth
Remove global QueryClient refetchInterval 5000 (caused /api poll every 5s → auth dialog)
index.html Cache-Control no-cache so browsers load new hashed bundles
Skip AuthProvider when OIDC not configured; split OidcProtectedRoute hooks
